race.comment: SERAPHOX (9) was handed a huge task on debut last start in the Group 2 Todman Stakes and considering he raced wide the effort to be beaten a tick over four lengths had merit. Will be given every chance by McDonald and in this inferior field he looks a great chance to break through. DON VALIENTE (4) crabbed around the bend on debut at Gosford and did well to stick on for third. In good hands so expect him to learn a lot from that first outing. FAWLTY AFFAIRS (5) started $7.00 on a Listed race at Caulfield recently and was there on straightening but tired late. Zac Lloyd is on the crest of a wave and will give this colt every chance. SWITCH ON (13) is a half to the multiple stakes-placed Tardelli on debut for the Nathan Doyle stable. Has won both public trials so she must be respected. TIGER TURF (1) hasn't been far away in two runs to date - one for the exotics.
